name: PowerX Optimizer
description_short: Rules-based trading scanner by Rockwell Trading that scans 18,000+ assets for high-probability stock and options setups with defined entry, exit, and risk-to-reward signals.
description_long:
PowerX Optimizer is a web-based trading platform developed by Rockwell Trading Services LLC, founded by Markus Heitkoetter in 2005. The platform scans over 18,000 stocks, ETFs, and cryptocurrencies in real time to surface high-probability trade setups based on a proprietary scoring system. Two core strategies power the platform: the PowerX Strategy for directional stock and options trades, and the Wheel Strategy for systematic options premium collection — the latter is recommended for accounts with at least $20,000.

Every scan result is accompanied by clear, rules-based entry and exit signals with defined risk-to-reward ratios, allowing traders to evaluate setups objectively before committing capital. The WTF (Win The Fear) Strategy Scanner is designed specifically for traders with smaller accounts. By automating the scanning and analysis process, PowerX Optimizer targets busy professionals who can realistically dedicate only 15 minutes per day to managing trades.

The February 2026 release of version 3.7 brought several notable upgrades, including Rocky AI — an AI-powered trading assistant that displays its reasoning process in real time so users understand why a setup is being flagged. The update also introduced WealthOS Goals, a financial freedom planning tool that projects a personalized Freedom Date based on trading inputs, and added Charles Schwab brokerage integration alongside the existing Tradier connection for direct trade execution within the platform.

PowerX Optimizer is priced as a one-time lifetime license, typically ranging from $1,997 to $3,997 depending on the package or current promotional pricing, with no monthly or annual fees thereafter. The platform includes an integrated trading journal, access to an active Mighty Networks community, and a 30-day money-back guarantee. Because it runs entirely in the browser, no installation is required and it is accessible from any device.

tiers.name: Lifetime License
features: Real-time scanner for 18,000+ stocks, ETFs, and crypto
PowerX Strategy and Wheel Strategy signals
WTF Strategy Scanner for smaller accounts
Rocky AI trading assistant with visible reasoning
WealthOS Goals financial freedom planning tool
Tradier and Charles Schwab brokerage integration

pros: Clear rules-based entry and exit signals reduce emotional trading decisions
One-time lifetime license with no ongoing subscription fees
Rocky AI shows its reasoning to help traders understand and validate setups
Covers 18,000+ assets in real time across stocks, ETFs, options, and crypto
Active community and consistent software updates with new features added regularly
cons: High upfront cost of $1,997–$3,997 is a significant barrier for new traders
Steep learning curve — not suitable for complete beginners with no trading experience
No built-in backtesting engine or paper trading mode for strategy validation
Significantly mixed reviews across platforms suggest inconsistent user experiences
best_for: options traders using the Wheel strategy
busy professionals with limited time for market analysis
traders wanting defined entry and exit criteria with risk-to-reward ratios
